Introduction
    Yeh sang woo lui wong: Ha je chuen kei is a movie starring Amy Yip, Fui-On Shing, and Patrick Hon. This is the legend of Ha, and how she became the queen of the underworld. Working as a prostitute, abused by the men she cares for,...
